H8002.d: properly, requital, i.e. a (voluntary) sacrifice in thanks

H8003.k: full, just, made ready, peaceable, perfect(-ed), quiet, Shalem (by mistake for a name), whole.

H8004.d: Shalem, an early name of Jerusalem

H8007.d: Salma, the name of two Israelites

H8013.d: Shelomoth, the name of two Israelites
H8013.k: Shelomith (from the margin), Shelomoth. Compare H8019 (שְׁלֹמִית).

H8016.d: a Shilemite (collectively) or descendants of Shillem

H8017.e: from H7965 (שָׁלוֹם) and H410 (אֵל); peace of God;

H8018.d: Shelemjah, the name of nine Israelites
H8018.e: or שֶׁלֶמְיָהוּ; from H8002 (שֶׁלֶם) and H3050 (יָהּ); thankoffering of Jah;

H8019.d: Shelomith, the name of five Israelites and three Israelitesses

H8020.d: Shalman, a king apparently of Assyria

H8024.d: a Shelanite (collectively), or descendants of Shelah

H8025.d: to pull out, up or off

H8027.d: to be (causatively, make) triplicate (by restoration, in portions, strands, days or years)
H8027.e: a primitive root perhaps originally to intensify, i.e. treble; but apparently used only as denominative from H7969 (שָׁלוֹשׁ),
H8027.k: do the third time, (divide into, stay) three (days, -fold, parts, years old).

H8029.d: a descendant of the third degree, i.e. great grandchild

H8030.e: feminine from the same as H8028 (שֶׁלֶשׁ); triplication;

H8032.d: trebly, i.e. (in time) day before yesterday
H8032.e: or שִׁלְשֹׁם; from the same as H8028 (שֶׁלֶשׁ);
H8032.k: [phrase] before (that time, -time), excellent things (from the margin), [phrase] heretofore, three days, [phrase] time past.

H8033.d: there (transferring to time) then; often thither, or thence
H8033.e: a primitive particle (rather from the relative pronoun, H834 (אֲשֶׁר));
H8033.k: in it, [phrase] thence, there (-in, [phrase] of, [phrase] out), [phrase] thither, [phrase] whither.

H8034.d: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
H8034.e: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

H8035.d: Shem, a son of Noah (often includ. his posterity)

H8036.d: {an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character}

H8038.e: apparently from H8034 (שֵׁם) and H83 (אֵבֶר); name of pinion, i.e. illustrious;

H8040.d: properly, dark (as enveloped), i.e. the north; hence (by orientation), the left hand
H8040.e: or שְׂמֹאל; a primitive word (rather perhaps from the same as H8071 (שִׂמְלָה) (by insertion of the aleph) through the idea of wrapping up);

H8041.d: to use the left hand or pass in that direction)

H8045.k: destory(-uction), bring to nought, overthrow, perish, pluck down, [idiom] utterly.

H8048.d: Shammah, the name of an Edomite and four Israelites

H8050.d: Shemuel, the name of three Israelites
H8050.e: from the passive participle of H8085 (שָׁמַע) and H410 (אֵל); heard of God;

H8051.d: Shammua, the name of four Israelites

H8052.k: bruit, doctrine, fame, mentioned, news, report, rumor, tidings.

H8055.d: probably to brighten up, i.e. (figuratively) be (causatively, make) blithe or gleesome
H8055.k: cheer up, be (make) glad, (have, make) joy(-ful), be (make) merry, (cause to, make to) rejoice, [idiom] very.

H8057.k: [idiom] exceeding(-ly), gladness, joy(-fulness), mirth, pleasure, rejoice(-ing).

H8058.d: to fling down; incipiently to jostle; figuratively, to let alone, desist, remit
H8058.k: discontinue, overthrow, release, let rest, shake, stumble, throw down.

H8059.d: remission (of debt) or suspension of labor)

H8060.d: Shammai, the name of three Israelites

H8061.e: apparently from H8034 (שֵׁם) and H3045 (יָדַע); name of knowing;

H8062.d: a Shemidaite (collectively) or descendants of Shemida

H8063.d: a run (as sustaining the Oriental sitter)

H8064.d: the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve)
H8064.e: dual of an unused singular שָׁמֶה; from an unused root meaning to be lofty;

H8065.d: {the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve)}

H8068.d: a thorn; also (from its keenness for scratching) a gem, probably the diamond
H8068.e: from H8104 (שָׁמַר) in the original sense of pricking;

H8069.d: Shamir, the name of two places in Palestine

H8070.d: Shemiramoth, the name of two Israelites
H8070.e: or שְׁמָרִימוֹת; probably from H8034 (שֵׁם) and plural of H7413 (רָמָה); name of heights;

H8071.e: perhaps by permutation for the feminine of H5566 (סֶמֶל) (through the idea of a cover assuming the shape of the object beneath);
H8071.k: apparel, cloth(-es, -ing), garment, raiment. Compare H8008 (שַׂלְמָה).

H8072.e: probably for the same as H8071 (שִׂמְלָה);

H8074.d: to stun (or intransitively, grow numb), i.e. devastate or (figuratively) stupefy (both usually in a passive sense)
H8074.k: make amazed, be astonied, (be an) astonish(-ment), (be, bring into, unto, lay, lie, make) desolate(-ion, places), be destitute, destroy (self), (lay, lie, make) waste, wonder.

H8075.d: {to stun (or intransitively, grow numb), i.e. devastate or (figuratively) stupefy (both usually in a passive sense)}

H8079.d: a lizard (from the superstition of its noxiousness)
H8079.e: probably from H8074 (שָׁמֵם) (in the sense of poisoning);

H8080.d: to shine, i.e. (by analogy) be (causatively, make) oily or gross

H8081.d: grease, especially liquid (as from the olive, often perfumed); figuratively, richness
H8081.k: anointing, [idiom] fat (things), [idiom] fruitful, oil(-ed), ointment, olive, [phrase] pine.

H8083.d: a cardinal number, eight (as if a surplus above the 'perfect' seven); also (as ordinal) eighth
H8083.e: or שְׁמוֹנֶה; feminine שְׁמֹנָה; or שְׁמוֹנָה; apparently from H8082 (שָׁמֵן) through the idea of plumpness;

H8085.d: to hear intelligently (often with implication of attention, obedience, etc.; causatively, to tell, etc.)
H8085.k: [idiom] attentively, call (gather) together, [idiom] carefully, [idiom] certainly, consent, consider, be content, declare, [idiom] diligently, discern, give ear, (cause to, let, make to) hear(-ken, tell), [idiom] indeed, listen, make (a) noise, (be) obedient, obey, perceive, (make a) proclaim(-ation), publish, regard, report, shew (forth), (make a) sound, [idiom] surely, tell, understand, whosoever (heareth), witness.

H8086.d: {to hear intelligently (often with implication of attention, obedience, etc.; causatively, to tell, etc.)}

H8087.d: Shema, the name of a place in Palestine and of four Israelites

H8088.d: something heard, i.e. a sound, rumor, announcement; abstractly, audience
H8088.k: bruit, fame, hear(-ing), loud, report, speech, tidings.

H8092.d: Shima, the name of four Israelites

H8095.d: Shimon, one of Jacob's sons, also the tribe descended from him

H8096.d: Shimi, the name of twenty Israelites
H8096.k: Shimeah (from the margin), Shimei, Shimhi, Shimi.

H8097.d: a Shimite (collectively) or descendants of Shimi

H8098.d: Shemajah, the name of twenty-five Israelites
H8098.e: or שְׁמַעְיָהוּ; from H8085 (שָׁמַע) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has heard;

H8099.d: a Shimonite (collectively) or descendants of Shimon

H8101.d: a Shimathite (collectively) or descendants of Shimah

H8102.e: from an unused root meaning to emit a sound;

H8104.d: properly, to hedge about (as with thorns), i.e. guard; generally, to protect, attend to, etc.
H8104.k: beward, be circumspect, take heed (to self), keep(-er, self), mark, look narrowly, observe, preserve, regard, reserve, save (self), sure, (that lay) wait (for), watch(-man).

H8105.d: something preserved, i.e. the settlings (plural only) of wine

H8106.d: Shemer, the name of three Israelites

H8108.e: feminine of an unused noun from H8104 (שָׁמַר) meaning a guard;

H8109.e: feminine of passive participle of H8104 (שָׁמַר);

H8110.d: Shimron, the name of an Israelite and of a place in Palestine
H8110.e: from H8105 (שֶׁמֶר) in its original sense; guardianship;

H8111.e: from the active participle of H8104 (שָׁמַר); watch-station;

H8112.e: from H8110 (שִׁמְרוֹן) and a derivative of H4754 (מָרָא); guard of lashing;

H8113.d: Shimri, the name of four Israelites
H8113.e: from H8105 (שֶׁמֶר) in its original sense; watchful;

H8114.d: Shemarjah, the name of four Israelites
H8114.e: or שְׁמַרְיָהוּ; from H8104 (שָׁמַר) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has guarded;

H8117.d: a Shimronite (collectively) or descendants of Shimron

H8118.d: a Shomeronite (collectively) or inhabitants of Shomeron

H8120.e: (Aramaic) corresponding to the root of H8121 (שֶׁמֶשׁ) through the idea of activity implied in day-light;

H8121.d: the sun; by implication, the east; figuratively, a ray, i.e. (architectural) a notched battlement
H8121.e: from an unused root meaning to be brilliant;
H8121.k: [phrase] east side(-ward), sun (rising), [phrase] west(-ward), window. See also H1053 (בֵּית שֶׁמֶשׁ).

H8126.d: a Shumathite (collectively) or descendants of Shumah
H8126.e: patronymically from an unused name from H7762 (שׁוּם) probably meaning garlic-smell;

H8127.d: a tooth (as sharp); specifically  ivory; figuratively, a cliff

H8134.e: probably from H8132 (שָׁנָא) and H1 (אָב); a father has turned;

H8138.d: to fold, i.e. duplicate (literally or figuratively); by implication, to transmute (transitive or intransitive)
H8138.k: do (speak, strike) again, alter, double, (be given to) change, disguise, (be) diverse, pervert, prefer, repeat, return, do the second time.

H8141.d: a year (as a revolution of time)

H8143.d: probably, tooth of elephants, i.e. ivory tusk
H8143.e: from H8127 (שֵׁן) and the plural apparently of a foreign word;

H8144.d: crimson, properly, the insect or its color, also stuff dyed with it

H8145.d: properly, double, i.e. second; also adverbially, again

H8147.k: both, couple, double, second, twain, [phrase] twelfth, [phrase] twelve, [phrase] twenty (sixscore) thousand, twice, two.

H8149.d: Shenir or Senir, a summit of Lebanon
H8149.e: or שְׂנִיר; from an unused root meaning to be pointed; peak;

H8150.d: to point (transitive or intransitive); intensively, to pierce; figuratively, to inculcate

H8156.d: to split or tear; figuratively, to upbraid

H8158.d: to cut in pieces, i.e. slaughter

H8159.d: to gaze at or about (properly, for help); by implication, to inspect, consider, compassionate, be nonplussed (as looking around in amazement) or bewildered
H8159.k: depart, be dim, be dismayed, look (away), regard, have respect, spare, turn.

H8160.d: properly, a look, i.e. a moment
H8160.e: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H8159 (שָׁעָה);

H8161.e: feminine from an unused root meaning to stamp;

H8162.d: linsey-woolsey, i.e. cloth of linen and wool carded and spun together
H8162.k: garment of divers sorts, linen and wollen.

H8163.d: shaggy; as noun, a he-goat; by analogy, a faun
H8163.k: devil, goat, hairy, kid, rough, satyr.

H8165.d: Seir, a mountain of Idumaea and its aboriginal occupants, also one in Palestine

H8168.d: the palm; by extension, a handful
H8168.e: from an unused root meaning to hollow out;

H8169.d: Shaalbim or Shaalabbin, a place in Palestine
H8169.e: or שַׁעֲלַבִּין; plural from H7776 (שׁוּעָל); fox-holes;

H8170.d: a Shaalbonite or inhabitant of Shaalbin

H8172.k: lean, lie, rely, rest (on, self), stay.

H8173.d: (in a good acceptation) to look upon (with complacency), i.e. fondle, please or amuse (self); (in a bad one) to look about (in dismay), i.e. stare
H8173.k: cry (out) (by confusion with H7768 (שָׁוַע)), dandle, delight (self), play, shut.

H8174.d: Shaaph, the name of two Israelites

H8175.d: to storm; by implication, to shiver, i.e. fear
H8175.k: be (horribly) afraid, fear, hurl as a storm, be tempestuous, come like (take away as with) a whirlwind.

H8176.d: to act as gatekeeper; (figuratively) to estimate
H8176.e: a primitive root; to split or open, i.e. (literally, but only as denominative from H8179 (שַׁעַר)); compare see H7778 (שׁוֹעֵר)

H8178.k: affrighted, [idiom] horribly, [idiom] sore, storm. See H8181 (שֵׂעָר).

H8179.d: an opening, i.e. door or gate
H8179.e: from H8176 (שָׁעַר) in its original sense;

H8181.e: or שַׂעַר; (Isaiah 7:20), from H8175 (שָׂעַר) in the sense of dishevelling;

H8184.e: or שְׂעוֹרָה (feminine meaning the plant); and (masculine meaning the grain); also שְׂעֹר; or שְׂעוֹר; from H8175 (שָׂעַר) in the sense of roughness;

H8186.e: or שַׁעֲרִירִיָּה; or שַׁעֲרֻרִת; feminine from H8176 (שָׁעַר) in the sense of H8175 (שָׂעַר);

H8187.e: from H8176 (שָׁעַר) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has stormed;

H8188.e: masculine plural of H8184 (שְׂעֹרָה); barley grains;

H8193.d: the lip (as a natural boundary); by implication, language; by analogy, a margin (of a vessel, water, cloth, etc.)
H8193.e: or (in dual and plural) שֶׂפֶת; probably from H5595 (סָפָה) or H8192 (שָׁפָה) through the idea of termination (compare H5490 (סוֹף));
H8193.k: band, bank, binding, border, brim, brink, edge, language, lip, prating, (sea-)shore, side, speech, talk, (vain) words.

H8194.d: a cheese (as strained from the whey)
H8194.e: from H8192 (שָׁפָה) in the sense of clarifying;

H8195.e: or שְׁפִי; from H8192 (שָׁפָה); baldness (compare H8205 (שְׁפִי));

H8197.e: or שְׁפוּפָן; from the same as H8207 (שְׁפִיפֹן); serpent-like;

H8198.d: a female slave (as a member of the household)
H8198.e: feminine from an unused root meaning to spread out (as a family; see H4940 (מִשְׁפָּחָה));

H8199.d: to judge, i.e. pronounce sentence (for or against); by implication, to vindicate or punish; by extenssion, to govern; passively, to litigate (literally or figuratively)
H8199.k: [phrase] avenge, [idiom] that condemn, contend, defend, execute (judgment), (be a) judge(-ment), [idiom] needs, plead, reason, rule.

H8202.d: Shaphat, the name of four Israelites

H8203.d: Shephatjah, the name of ten Israelites
H8203.e: or שְׁפַטְיָהוּ; from H8199 (שָׁפַט) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has judged;

H8205.d: bareness; concretely, a bare hill or plain

H8206.e: plural of an unused noun from the same as H8207 (שְׁפִיפֹן) and meaning the same; serpents;

H8207.d: a kind of serpent (as snapping), probably the cerastes or horned adder
H8207.e: from an unused root meaning the same as H7779 (שׁוּף);

H8209.e: (Aramaic) intensive of a form corresponding to H8208 (שָׁפִיר);

H8210.d: to spill forth (blood, a libation, liquid metal; or even a solid, i.e. to mound up); also (figuratively) to expend (life, soul, complaint, money, etc.); intensively, to sprawl out
H8210.k: cast (up), gush out, pour (out), shed(-der, out), slip.

H8211.d: an emptying place, e.g. an ash-heap

H8212.d: a pipe (for pouring forth, e.g. wine), i.e. the penis
H8212.e: feminine of a derivative from H8210 (שָׁפַךְ);

H8213.d: to depress or sink (expectation figuratively, to humiliate, intransitive or transitive)
H8213.k: abase, bring (cast, put) down, debase, humble (self), be (bring, lay, make, put) low(-er).

H8214.d: {to depress or sink (expectation figuratively, to humiliate, intransitive or transitive)}

H8219.d: Lowland, i.e. (with the article) the maritime slope of Palestine

H8221.d: Shepham, a place in or near Palestine

H8225.d: a Shiphmite or inhabitant of Shepham

H8227.d: a species of rockrabbit (from its hiding), i.e. probably the hyrax

H8228.e: from an unused root meaning to abound;

H8231.d: to glisten, i.e. (figuratively) be (causatively, make) fair

H8234.d: Shepher, a place in the Desert

H8237.d: splendid, i.e. a tapestry or canopy

H8239.d: to locate, i.e. (generally) hang on or (figuratively) establish, reduce

H8240.d: a (double) stall (for cattle); also a (two-pronged) hook (for flaying animals on)

H8242.d: properly, a mesh (as allowing a liquid to run through), i.e. coarse loose cloth or sacking (used in mourning and for bagging); hence, a bag (for grain, etc.)

H8245.d: to be alert, i.e. sleepless; hence to be on the lookout (whether for good or ill)

H8246.k: make like (unto, after the fashion of) almonds.

H8247.d: the almond (tree or nut; as being the earliest in bloom)

H8248.d: to quaff, i.e. (causatively) to irrigate or furnish apotion to
H8248.k: cause to (give, give to, let, make to) drink, drown, moisten, water. See H7937 (שָׁכַר), H8354 (שָׁתָה).

H8251.d: disgusting, i.e. filthy; especially idolatrous or (concretely) an idol

H8252.k: appease, idleness, (at, be at, be in, give) quiet(-ness), (be at, be in, give, have, take) rest, settle, be still.

H8254.d: to suspend or poise (especially in trade)

H8255.d: probably a weight; used as a commercial standard

H8257.d: to subside; by implication, to be overflowed, cease; causatively, to abate, subdue
H8257.k: make deep, let down, drown, quench, sink.

H8259.d: properly, to lean out (of a window), i.e. (by implication) peep or gaze (passively, be a spectacle)

H8260.d: a loophole (for looking out), to admit light and air

H8261.d: an embrasure or opening  with bevelled jam

H8262.d: to be filthy, i.e. (intensively) to loathe, pollute
H8262.k: abhor, make abominable, have in abomination, detest, [idiom] utterly.

H8263.d: filth, i.e. (figuratively and specifically) an idolatrous object

H8264.d: to course (like a beast of prey); by implication, to seek greedily
H8264.k: have appetite, justle one against another, long, range, run (to and fro).

H8266.d: to cheat, i.e. be untrue (usually in words)

H8267.d: an untruth; by implication, a sham (often adverbial)
H8267.k: without a cause, deceit(-ful), false(-hood, -ly), feignedly, liar, [phrase] lie, lying, vain (thing), wrongfully.

H8269.d: a head person (of any rank or class)
H8269.k: captain (that had rule), chief (captain), general, governor, keeper, lord,(-task-)master, prince(-ipal), ruler, steward.

H8270.d: a string (as twisted ), i.e. (specifically) the umbilical cord (also figuratively, as the centre of strength)

H8271.d: to free, separate; figuratively, to unravel, commence; by implication (of unloading beasts) to reside
H8271.e: (Aramaic) a root corresponding to that of H8293 (שֵׁרוּת);

H8272.d: Sharetser, the name of an Assyrian and an Israelite

H8273.d: quivering glow (of the air), expectation. the mirage
H8273.e: from an unused root meaning to glare;

H8274.d: Sherebjah, the name of two Israelites
H8274.e: from H8273 (שָׁרָב) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has brought heat;

H8277.d: properly, to puncture, i.e. (figuratively through the idea of slipping out) to escape or survive

H8279.d: a (carpenter's) scribing-awl (for pricking or scratching measurements)

H8285.e: from H8324 (שָׁרַר) in its original sense of pressing;

H8287.e: probably from H8281 (שָׁרָה) (in the sense of dwelling (compare H8271 (שְׁרֵא)) and H2580 (חֵן); abode of pleasure;

H8289.d: plain, Sharon, the name of a place in Palestine

H8290.d: a Sharonite or inhabitant of Sharon

H8291.e: passive participle from the same as H8321 (שֹׂרֵק);

H8292.d: a whistling (in scorn); by analogy, a piping
H8292.e: or (by permutation) שְׁרִיקָה; feminine passive participle of H8319 (שָׁרַק);

H8302.e: or שִׁרְיֹן; and שִׁרְיָן; also (feminine) שִׁרְיָה; and שִׁרְיֹנָה; from H8281 (שָׁרָה) in the original sense of turning;
H8302.k: breastplate, coat of mail, habergeon, harness. See H5630 (סִרְיֹן).

H8303.d: Shirjon or Sirjon, a peak of the Lebanon
H8303.e: and שִׂרְיֹן; the same as H8304 (שְׂרָיָה) (i.e. sheeted with snow);

H8304.d: Serajah, the name of nine Israelites
H8304.e: or שְׂרָיָהוּ; from H8280 (שָׂרָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has prevailed;

H8305.d: hetchelling (or combing flax), i.e. (concretely) tow (by extension, linen cloth)
H8305.e: from the same as H8321 (שֹׂרֵק) in the original sense of piercing;

H8306.e: from H8324 (שָׁרַר) in the original sense as in H8270 (שֹׁר) (compare H8326 (שֹׁרֶר));

H8307.e: from H8324 (שָׁרַר) in the sense of twisted, i.e. firm;

H8309.e: probably by an orthographical error for H7709 (שְׁדֵמָה);

H8311.d: to prolong, i.e. (reflex) be deformed by excess of members
H8311.k: stretch out self, (have any) superfluous thing.

H8313.k: (cause to, make a) burn((-ing), up) kindle, [idiom] utterly.

H8314.d: burning, i.e. (figuratively) poisonous (serpent); specifically, a saraph or symbolical creature (from their copper color)

H8317.d: to wriggle, i.e. (by implication) swarm or abound
H8317.k: breed (bring forth, increase) abundantly (in abundance), creep, move.

H8318.d: a swarm, i.e. active mass of minute animals

H8319.d: properly, to be shrill, i.e. to whistle or hiss (as a call or in scorn)

H8320.d: bright red (as piercing to the sight), i.e. bay

H8321.d: a vine stock (properly, one yielding purple grapes, the richest variety)
H8321.e: or שׂוֹרֵק; and (feminine) שֹׂרֵקָה; from H8319 (שָׁרַק) in the sense of redness (compare H8320 (שָׂרֻק));

H8323.d: to have (transitively, exercise; reflexively, get) dominion
H8323.k: [idiom] altogether, make self a prince, (bear) rule.

H8324.d: to be hostile (only active participle an opponent)

H8326.d: the umbilical cord, i.e. (by extension) a bodice
H8326.e: from H8324 (שָׁרַר) in the sense of twisting (compare H8270 (שֹׁר));

H8327.d: to root, i.e. strike into the soil, or (by implication) to pluck from it

H8332.e: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H8327 (שָׁרַשׁ);

H8334.d: to attend as a menial or worshipper; figuratively, to contribute to

H8336.d: bleached stuff, i.e. white linen or (by analogy) marble
H8336.e: or (for alliteration with H4897 (מֶשִׁי)) שְׁשִׁי; for H7893 (שַׁיִשׁ);

H8337.d: six (as an overplus  beyond five or the fingers of the hand); as ord. sixth
H8337.e: masculine שִׁשָּׁה; a primitive number; compare H7797 (שׂוּשׂ)

H8338.k: leave by the sixth part (by confusion with H8341 (שָׁשָׁה)).

H8341.d: to sixth or divide into sixths

H8347.d: Sheshak, a symbolic name of Babylon

H8349.e: probably from the base of H7785 (שׁוֹק); pedestrian;

H8350.e: perhaps from the base of H8324 (שָׁרַר) in the sense of that of H8320 (שָׂרֻק);

H8354.k: [idiom] assuredly, banquet, [idiom] certainly, drink(-er, -ing), drunk ([idiom] -ard), surely. (Prop. intensive of H8248 (שָׁקָה).)

H8356.d: a basis, i.e. (figuratively) political or moral support

H8359.d: a fixture, i.e. the warp in weaving

H8363.d: a sprig (as if transplanted), i.e. sucker

H8364.d: a Shuthalchite (collectively) or descendants of Shuthelach

H8371.d: to place, i.e. array; reflex. to lie

H8372.e: and (feminine) תָּאָה; (Ezekiel 40:12), from (the base of) H8376 (תָּאָה);

H8374.e: a primitive root (probably identical with H8373 (תָּאַב) through the idea of puffing disdainfully at; compare H340 (אָיַב));

H8377.d: a species of antelope (probably from the white stripe on the cheek)
H8377.e: and תּוֹא; (the original form), from H8376 (תָּאָה);

H8378.d: a longing; by implication, a delight (subjectively, satisfaction, objectively, a charm)
H8378.k: dainty, desire, [idiom] exceedingly, [idiom] greedily, lust(ing), pleasant. See also H6914 (קִבְרוֹת הַתַּאֲוָה).

H8380.d: a twin (in plural only), literally or figuratively

H8382.d: to be (causatively, make) twinned, i.e. (figuratively) duplicate or (architectural) jointed
H8382.e: a primitive root; to be complete; but used only as denominative from H8380 (תָּאוֹם),

H8384.e: or (in the singular, feminine) תְּאֵנָה; perhaps of foreign derivation

H8387.e: from H8385 (תַּאֲנָה) and H7887 (שִׁילֹה); approach of Shiloh;

H8388.k: be drawn, mark out, (Rimmon-) methoar (by union with H7417 (רִמּוֹן)).

H8389.k: [phrase] beautiful, [idiom] comely, countenance, [phrase] fair, [idiom] favoured, form, [idiom] goodly, [idiom] resemble, visage.

H8391.d: a species of cedar (from its erectness)

H8394.d: intelligence; by implication, an argument; by extension, caprice
H8394.e: and (feminine) תְּבוּנָה; or תּוֹבֻנָה; from H995 (בִּין);

H8396.d: Tabor, a mountain in Palestine, also a city adjacent
H8396.e: from a root corresponding to H8406 (תְּבַר); broken region;

H8398.d: the earth (as moist and therefore inhabited); by extension, the globe; by implication, its inhabitants; specifically, a particular land, as Babylonia, Palestine

H8400.e: from H1101 (בָּלַל) in the original sense of flowing;

H8401.d: properly, material, i.e. (specifically) refuse haum or stalks of grain (as chopped in threshing and used for fodder)

H8403.d: structure; by implication, a model, resemblance

H8404.d: Taberah, a place in the Desert

H8405.e: from the same as H948 (בּוּץ); whiteness;

H8407.d: Tiglath-Pileser or Tilgath-pilneser, an Assyryrian king
H8407.e: or תִּגְלַת פְּלֶסֶר; or תִּלְגַּת פִּלְנְאֶסֶר or תִּלְגַּת פִּלְנֶסֶר; of foreign derivation;

H8410.d: enduring; a species of hard-wood or lasting tree (perhaps oak)

H8411.e: (Aramaic) from H1753 (דּוּר) in the original sense of enduring;

H8412.e: or תַּמֹּר; (1 Kings 9:18), apparently from H8558 (תָּמָר); palm-city;

H8414.d: a desolation (of surface), i.e. desert; figuratively, a worthless thing; adverbially, in vain
H8414.e: from an unused root meaning to lie waste;
H8414.k: confusion, empty place, without form, nothing, (thing of) nought, vain, vanity, waste, wilderness.

H8415.d: an abyss (as a surging mass of water), especially the deep (the main sea or the subterranean watersupply)

H8417.e: feminine of an unused noun (apparently from H1984 (הָלַל)) meaning bluster;

H8420.d: a mark; by implication, a signature

H8421.e: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7725 (שׁוּב), to come back;

H8422.d: Tubal, a postdiluvian patriarch and his posterity
H8422.e: or תֻּבַל; probably of foreign derivation;

H8423.e: apparently from H2986 (יָבַל) (compare H2981 (יְבוּל)) and H7014 (קַיִן); offspring of Cain;

H8425.d: Togarmah, a son of Gomer and his posterity
H8425.e: or תֹּגַרְמָה; probably of foreign derivation;

H8426.d: properly, an extension of the hand, i.e. (by implication) avowal, or (usually) adoration; specifically, a choir of worshippers

H8427.d: to mark out, i.e. (primitive) scratch or (definite) imprint

H8428.e: a primitive root (or perhaps identical with H8427 (תָּוָה) through a similar idea from scraping to pieces);

H8429.d: to amaze, i.e. (reflex. by implication) take alarm
H8429.e: (Aramaic) corresponding to H8539 (תָּמַהּ) or perhaps to H7582 (שָׁאָה) through the idea of sweeping to ruin (compare H8428 (תָּוָה));

H8430.e: from an unused root meaning to depress; humble;

H8432.d: a bisection, i.e. (by implication) the centre
H8432.e: from an unused root meaning to sever;
H8432.k: among(-st), [idiom] between, half, [idiom] (there-, where-), in(-to), middle, mid(-night), midst (among), [idiom] out (of), [idiom] through, [idiom] with(-in).

H8433.d: chastisement; figuratively (by words) correction, refutation, proof (even in defence)
H8433.k: argument, [idiom] chastened, correction, reasoning, rebuke, reproof, [idiom] be (often) reproved.

H8437.d: causing to howl, i.e. an oppressor

H8438.d: the crimson-grub, but used only (in this connection) of the colorfrom it, and cloths dyed therewith
H8438.e: and (feminine) תּוֹלֵעָה; or תּוֹלַעַת; or תֹּלַעַת; from H3216 (יָלַע); a maggot (as voracious); specifically (often with ellipsis of H8144 (שָׁנִי))

H8439.d: Tola, the name of two Israelites

H8440.d: a Tolaite (collectively) or descendants of Tola

H8441.d: properly, something disgusting (morally), i.e. (as noun) an abhorrence; especially idolatry or (concretely) an idol
H8441.e: or תֹּעֵבַה; feminine active participle of H8581 (תַּעָב);

H8443.d: (only in plural collective) weariness, i.e. (by implication) toil (treasure so obtained) or speed

H8444.d: (only in plural collective) exit, i.e. (geographical) boundary, or (figuratively) deliverance, (actively) source

H8445.e: from the same as H3349 (יִקָּהָה); obedience;

H8446.d: to meander (causatively, guide) about, especially fortrade or reconnoitring
H8446.k: chap(-man), sent to descry, be excellent, merchant(-man), search (out), seek, (e-) spy (out).

H8447.d: a succession, i.e. a string or (abstractly) order

H8448.d: a manner (as a sort of turn)

H8449.d: a ring-dove, often (figuratively) as a term of endearment
H8449.e: or תֹּר; probably the same as H8447 (תּוֹר);

H8451.d: a precept or statute, especially the Decalogue or Pentateuch

H8453.e: or תֹּשָׁב; (1 Kings 17:1), from H3427 (יָשַׁב); a dweller (but not outlandish (H5237 (נׇכְרִי))); especially (as distinguished from a native citizen (active participle of H3427 (יָשַׁב)) and a temporary inmate (H1616 (גֵּר)) or mere lodger (H3885 (לוּן)))

H8454.d: support or (by implication) ability, i.e. (direct) help, (in purpose) an undertaking, (intellectual) understanding
H8454.e: or תֻּשִׁיָּה; from an unused root probably meaning to substantiate;
H8454.k: enterprise, that which (thing as it) is, substance, (sound) wisdom, working.

H8455.e: from an unused root meaning to smite;

H8458.d: (only in plural) properly, steerage (as a management of ropes), i.e. (figuratively) guidance or (by implication) a plan
H8458.e: or תַּחְבּוּלָה; from H2254 (חָבַל) as denominative from H2256 (חֶבֶל);

H8459.e: from an unused root meaning to depress; abasement;

H8462.e: from H2490 (חָלַל) in the sense of opening;

H8464.d: a species of unclean bird (from its violence), perhaps an owl

H8465.d: Tachan, the name of two Israelites

H8470.d: a Tachanite (collectively) or descendants of Tachan

H8471.d: Tachpanches, Techaphneches or Tachpenes, a place in Egypt
H8471.e: or תְּחַפְנְחֵס; (Ezekiel 30:18), or תַּחְפְּנֵס; (Jeremiah 2:16), of Egyptian derivation;

H8473.d: a linen corslet (as white or hollow)
H8473.e: from H2734 (חָרָה) in the original sense of H2352 (חוּר) or H2353 (חוּר);

H8474.e: a facitious root from H2734 (חָרָה) through the idea of the heat of jealousy;

H8476.d: a (clean) animal with fur, probably a species of antelope

H8478.d: the bottom (as depressed); only adverbially, below (often with prepositional prefix underneath), in lieu of, etc.
H8478.k: as, beneath, [idiom] flat, in(-stead), (same) place (where...is), room, for...sake, stead of, under, [idiom] unto, [idiom] when...was mine, whereas, (where-) fore, with.

H8479.d: {the bottom (as depressed); only adverbially, below (often with prepositional prefix underneath), in lieu of, etc.}

H8480.d: Tachath, the name of a place in the Desert, also of three Israelites

H8482.d: lowermost; as noun (feminine plural) the depths (figuratively, a pit, the womb)

H8483.e: apparently from the plural masculine of H8482 (תַּחְתִּי) or H8478 (תַּחַת) and H2320 (חֹדֶשׁ); lower (ones) monthly;

H8485.d: Tema, a son of Ishmael, and the region settled by him
H8485.e: or תֵּמָא; probably of foreign derivation;

H8486.d: the south (as being on the right hand of a person facing the east)

H8487.d: Teman, the name of two Edomites, and of the region and descendant of one of them
H8487.e: or תֵּמָן; the same as H8486 (תֵּימָן);

H8489.d: a Temanite or descendant of Teman

H8490.e: or תִּמָרָה; from the same as H8558 (תָּמָר);

H8491.d: a Titsite or descendant or inhabitant of an unknown Tits
H8491.e: patrial or patronymically from an unused noun of uncertain meaning;

H8492.d: must or fresh grape-juice (as just squeezed out); by implication (rarely) fermented wine
H8492.e: or תִּירֹשׁ; from H3423 (יָרַשׁ) in the sense of expulsion;

H8495.d: a buck or he-goat (as given to butting)
H8495.e: from an unused root meaning to butt;

H8496.e: or תּוֹך; (Psalm 72:14), from the same base as H8432 (תָּוֶךְ) (in the sense of cutting to pieces);

H8498.d: adjustment, i.e. structure; by implication, equipage

H8499.d: something arranged or fixed, i.e. a place
H8499.e: from H3559 (כּוּן); or probably identical with H8498 (תְּכוּנָה);

H8500.d: probably of foreign derivation; some imported creature, probably a peacock

H8504.d: the cerulean mussel, i.e. the color (violet) obtained therefrom or stuff dyed therewith

H8505.d: to balance, i.e. measure out (by weight or dimension); figuratively, arrange, equalize, through the idea of levelling (ment. estimate, test)
H8505.k: bear up, direct, be (un-)equal, mete, ponder, tell, weigh.

H8509.e: apparently from an unused root meaning to encompass;

H8511.d: to suspend; figuratively (through hesitation) to be uncertain; by implication (of mental dependence) to habituate

H8512.e: from H8510 (תֵּל) and H24 (אָבִיב); mound of green growth;

H8519.e: or תּלֻנָּה; from H3885 (לוּן) in the sense of obstinacy;

H8520.e: probably from an unused root meaning to dissever; breach;

H8521.e: from H8510 (תֵּל) and the feminine of H2798 (חֲרָשִׁים); mound of workmanship;

H8525.e: from an unused root meaning to accumulate;

H8526.d: Talmai, the name of a Canaanite and a Syrian

H8528.e: from H8510 (תֵּל) and H4417 (מֶלַח); mound of salt;

H8529.d: to crimson, i.e. dye that color

H8530.e: feminine from an unused root meaning to tower;

H8532.e: (Aramaic) masculine תְּלָתָה; (Aramaic), or תְּלָתָא; (Aramaic), corresponding to H7969 (שָׁלוֹשׁ);

H8534.e: by reduplication, from H8524 (תָּלַל) through the idea of vibration;

H8535.d: complete; usually (morally) pious; specifically, gentle, dear
H8535.k: coupled together, perfect, plain, undefiled, upright.

H8537.k: full, integrity, perfect(-ion), simplicity, upright(-ly, -ness), at a venture. See H8550 (תֻּמִּים).

H8539.k: be amazed, be astonished, marvel(-lously), wonder.

H8540.e: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H8539 (תָּמַהּ);

H8543.d: properly, ago, i.e. a (short or long) time since; especially yesterday, or  day before yesterday
H8543.e: or תְּמֹל; probably for H865 (אֶתְמוֹל); sometimes with  H8032 (שִׁלְשׁוֹם)
H8543.k: [phrase] before (-time), [phrase] these (three) days, [phrase] heretofore, [phrase] time past, yesterday.

H8544.d: something portioned (i.e. fashioned) out, as ashape, i.e. (indefinitely) phantom, or (specifically) embodiment, or (figuratively) manifestation (of favor)

H8548.d: properly, continuance (as indefinite extension); but used only (attributively as adjective) constant (or adverbially, constantly); ellipt. the regular (daily) sacrifice
H8548.e: from an unused root meaning to stretch;

H8549.d: entire (literally, figuratively or morally); also (as noun) integrity, truth
H8549.k: without blemish, complete, full, perfect, sincerely (-ity), sound, without spot, undefiled, upright(-ly), whole.

H8550.d: perfections, i.e. (techn.) one of the epithets of the objects in the high-priest's breastplate as an emblem of complete Truth

H8551.d: to sustain; by implication, to obtain, keep fast; figuratively, to help, follow close

H8552.d: to complete, in a good or a bad sense, literal, or figurative, transitive or intransitive
H8552.k: accomplish, cease, be clean (pass-) ed, consume, have done, (come to an, have an, make an) end, fail, come to the full, be all gone, [idiom] be all here, be (make) perfect, be spent, sum, be (shew self) upright, be wasted, whole.

H8553.d: Timnah, the name of two places in Palestine

H8554.d: a Timnite or inhabitant of Timnah

H8555.d: Timna, the name of two Edomites

H8556.e: or תִּמְנַת סֶרַח; from H8553 (תִּמְנָה) and H2775 (חֶרֶס); portion of (the) sun;

H8558.e: from an unused root meaning to be erect;

H8559.d: Tamar, the name of three women and a place

H8560.e: from the same root as H8558 (תָּמָר);

H8561.e: (plural or (feminine) תִּמֹּרָה; (singular and plural), from the same root as H8558 (תָּמָר);

H8562.d: properly, a scouring, i.e. soap or perfumery forthe bath; figuratively, a detergent
H8562.e: or תַּמְרֻק; or תַּמְרִיק; from H4838 (מָרַק);

H8564.d: an erection, i.e. pillar (probably for a guide-board)
H8564.e: from the same root as H8558 (תָּמָר);

H8565.d: a monster (as preternaturally formed), i.e. a sea-serpent (or other huge marine animal); also a jackal (or other hideous land animal)
H8565.e: from an unused root probably meaning to elongate;

H8566.d: to present (a mercenary inducement), i.e. bargain with (a harlot)

H8567.e: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of attributing honor);

H8571.e: perhaps from the same as H594 (אֲנָךְ) through the idea of protraction;

H8573.d: a brandishing (in threat); by implication, tumult; specifically, the official undulation of sacrificial offerings

H8575.e: or תַּנְחֻם; and (feminine) תַּנְחוּמָה; from H5162 (נָחַם);

H8577.d: a marine or land monster, i.e. sea-serpent or jackal
H8577.e: or תַּנִּים; (Ezekiel 29:3), intensive from the same as H8565 (תַּן);

H8580.d: properly, a hard breather, i.e. the name of two unclean creatures, a lizard and abird (both perhaps from changing color through their irascibility), probably the tree-toad and the water-hen

H8581.k: (make to be) abhor(-red), (be, commit more, do) abominable(-y), [idiom] utterly.

H8582.d: to vacillate, i.e. reel or stray (literally or figuratively); also causative of both
H8582.k: (cause to) go astray, deceive, dissemble, (cause to, make to) err, pant, seduce, (make to) stagger, (cause to) wander, be out of the way.

H8583.d: Tou or Toi, a Syrian king

H8585.d: a channel (into which water is raised for irrigation); also a bandage or plaster (as placed upon a wound)
H8585.k: conduit, cured, healing, little river, trench, watercourse.

H8586.d: caprice (as a fit coming on), i.e. vexation; concretely a tyrant

H8588.e: or תַּעֲנֻג; and (feminine) תַּעֲנֻגָה; from H6026 (עָנַג);

H8590.d: Taanak or Tanak, a place in Palestine

H8591.d: to cheat; by analogy, to maltreat

H8593.d: a knife or razor (as making bare); also a scabbard (as being bare, i.e. empty)

H8597.d: ornament (abstractly or concretely, literally or figuratively)
H8597.k: beauty(-iful), bravery, comely, fair, glory(-ious), honour, majesty.

H8598.d: an apple (from its fragrance), i.e. the fruit or the tree (probably includ. others of the pome order, as the quince, the orange, etc.)

H8599.d: Tappuach, the name of two places in Palestine, also of an Israelite

H8602.e: from an unused root meaning to smear;

H8603.d: Tophel, a place near the Desert
H8603.e: from the same as H8602 (תָּפֵל); quagmire;

H8605.d: intercession, supplication; by implication, a hymn

H8608.d: to drum, i.e. play (as) on the tambourine

H8610.d: to manipulate, i.e. seize; chiefly to capture, wield, specifically, to overlay; figuratively, to use unwarrantably
H8610.k: catch, handle, (lay, take) hold (on, over), stop, [idiom] surely, surprise, take.

H8615.d: literally a cord (as an attachment); figuratively, expectancy
H8615.k: expectation(-ted), hope, live, thing that I long for.

H8616.d: Tikvah, the name of two Israelites

H8621.d: a Tekoite or inhabitant of Tekoah

H8622.d: a revolution, i.e. (of the sun) course, (of time) lapse

H8626.d: to equalize, i.e. straighten (intransitive or transitive); figuratively, to compose

H8628.d: to clatter, i.e. slap (the hands together), clang (an instrument); by analogy, to drive (a nail or tent-pin, a dart, etc.); by implication, to become bondsman by handclasping)
H8628.k: blow (a trumpet), cast, clap, fasten, pitch (tent), smite, sound, strike, [idiom] suretiship, thrust.

H8631.d: to become (causatively, make) mighty or (figuratively) obstinate

H8636.d: multiplication, i.e. percentage or bonus in addition to principal

H8638.e: a denominative from H7275 (רָגַם) in the sense of throwing over;

H8641.d: a present (as offered up), especially in sacrifice or as tribute

H8643.d: clamor, i.e. acclamation of joy or a battle-cry; especially clangorof trumpets, as an alarum
H8643.k: alarm, blow(-ing) (of, the) (trumpets), joy, jubile, loud noise, rejoicing, shout(-ing), (high, joyful) sound(-ing).

H8644.e: from H7322 (רוּף) in the sense of its congener H7495 (רָפָא);

H8645.d: a species of tree (apparently from its slenderness), perhaps the cypress

H8646.d: Terach, the father of Abraham; also a place in the Desert

H8649.e: and תַּרְמוּת; or תַּרְמִית; from H7411 (רָמָה);

H8650.d: a pole (as a mast or flagstaff)

H8651.d: a door; by implication, a palace

H8654.d: a Tirathite or inhabitant of an unknown Tirah
H8654.e: patrial from an unused name meaning gate;

H8655.d: Teraphim (singular or plural) a family idol

H8656.d: Tirtsah, a place in Palestine; also an Israelitess

H8659.d: Tarshish, a place on the Mediterranean, hence, the ephithet of a merchant vessel (as if for or from that port); also the name of a Persian and of an Israelite
H8659.e: probably the same as H8658 (תַּרְשִׁישׁ) (as the region of the stone, or the reverse);

H8660.d: Tirshatha, the title of a Persian deputy or governor

H8662.d: Tartak, a deity of the Avvites

H8664.d: a Tishbite or inhabitant of Tishbeh (in Gilead)
H8664.e: patrial from an unused name meaning recourse;

H8666.d: a recurrence (of time or place); a reply (as returned)

H8668.d: rescue (literal or figurative, persons, national or spiritual)
H8668.e: or תְּשֻׁעָה; from H7768 (שָׁוַע) in the sense of H3467 (יָשַׁע);

H8669.e: from H7783 (שׁוּק) in the original sense of stretching out after;

H8670.e: from H7788 (שׁוּר) in the sense of arrival;

H8672.e: or (masculine) תִּשְׁעָה; perhaps from H8159 (שָׁעָה) through the idea of a turn to the next or full number ten;
